name: neupsh-skills
description: A home for reusable Claude Code skills, plugins, hooks, and agents.

plugins.name: design-system
plugins.description: Apply a reusable, token-driven design system to any web UI. Ships the quality foundation (OKLCH color ramps, type pairing, layered elevation, spacing/radius/shadow scales, density + light/dark theming) with a per-app tunable brand layer, plus class-and-token component primitives. Use to audit and uplift unpolished UIs.

plugins.name: safety-hooks
plugins.description: Defensive PreToolUse guards for Bash. Blocks grep/find/rg/fd searches that target virtual filesystems (/proc, /sys, /dev), which can cause infinite reads and pin CPU for hours.

plugins.name: engineering-skills
plugins.description: Staff/principal-engineer judgment encoded as executable guidance: running work with a model hierarchy (tech-lead), an opt-in ticket loop (autoship), cost-tiered testing (test-ladder), strangler-style modularization (ports-and-modules), free local AI substitutes (local-ai-stack), owning your own voice models (train-voice-models), and keeping agent-facing docs true (repo-truth).

plugins.name: personal-ops
plugins.description: Skills for high-stakes personal admin. Currently: amending a filed tax return in consumer tax software — derive the expected delta by hand before trusting the software's running total, handle employee-stock basis and wash sales, verify against the generated forms.

plugins.name: silverbullet
plugins.description: Work with SilverBullet 2.x — the self-hosted, local-first Markdown PKM. Space Lua config/queries/commands/widgets, the /.fs HTTP API for agent-driven note read/write, plug development, git-sync patterns, and PKM workflows. Corrects the many v1-only tutorials (SETTINGS.md, #query, federation) that no longer apply.
